info.english_meaning: to menaceto censureto threatento terrifyto scoldto mock
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' santarjane tarjayate BartsanArTe tu tarjati ' (Slo. 66) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tatastaM vAgBirugrABiH saMrabDaH samatarjayat' (hari॰2.119.77) samatarjayat=samatarjayata=aBartsayata nArTaH samA
